text.title: agentic-rag-query-decomposition Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-rag-query-decomposition as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sub-query decomposition produces overlapping sub-queries (e.g., "EU AI regulation" and "EU AI Act regulations") that retrieve nearly identical chunks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Overlapping sub-queries inflate context length and token costs without adding information. Use chunk deduplication by ID after retrieval. Consider generating sub-query embeddings and filtering out pairs with cosine similarity above 0.85.

failure-mode.description: Passing all sub-query results to the generator as separate context blocks without merging.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The generator receives fragmented context and may answer each sub-query independently rather than synthesizing a unified answer. Merge and deduplicate all chunks into a single context list before synthesis.
